zh.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒
zh.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素德勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley於1305年6月12日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒時，他的父親Bartholomew de Sudeley31歲，母親Maud Montfort21歲。他去世於1339年2月19日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley于1305年6月12日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒时，他的父亲Bartholomew de Sudeley31岁，母亲Maud Montfort21岁。他去世于1339年2月19日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley was born on 12 June 1305, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Bartholomew de Sudeley, was 31 and his mother, Maud Montfort, was 21. He died on 19 February 1339, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley est né le 12 juin 1305, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew de Sudeley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maud Montfort, avait 21 ans. Il est décédé le 19 février 1339, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley am 12. Juni 1305 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartholomew de Sudeley 31 und seine Mutter Maud Montfort 21. Er starb am 19. Februar 1339 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley è nato il il 12 giugno 1305 nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Bartholomew de Sudeley, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maud Montfort, aveva 21 anni. Morì il 19 febbraio 1339, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeleyが1305年6月12日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de Sudeleyは31歳，母Maud Montfortは21歳であった。彼は1339年2月19日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley(이)가 1305년 6월 12일 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomew de Sudeley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Montfort(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1339년 2월 19일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.12 June 1305–19 February 1339: 12 de junho de 1305–19 de fevereiro de 1339
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley nasceu em 12 de junho de 1305, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew de Sudeley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maud Montfort, tinha 21 anos. Ele faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1339, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley родился 12 июня 1305 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Bartholomew de Sudeley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Montfort, 21. Он умер 19 февраля 1339 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.12 June 1305–19 February 1339: 12 de junio de 1305–19 de febrero de 1339
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Sudeley 2nd Baron Sudeley nació el 12 de junio de 1305, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bartholomew de Sudeley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maud Montfort, tenía 21 años. Murió el 19 de febrero de 1339, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
